SecretsRegistry.description: Defines how the Capability Gateway resolves credentials for external capabilities. Secrets are never passed through agent payloads. Gateway resolves at execution time from vault.

none.description: No external secrets required. Agent operates on internal data only.

read_only_external.description: Agent may invoke capabilities that require read credentials (e.g. email search, file read). Gateway resolves credentials; agent never sees them.

read_write_external.description: Agent may invoke capabilities that require write credentials (e.g. save file, send email). Requires trust_tier >= 3. GUIDE only.
